_schema: Research queue — active leads for AI Layoff Tracker expansion. Each lead must be verified against a primary source before promotion to entries.json.

_fields.notes: Free-text research notes with source links

queue.notes: Already in dataset (Tier 1, DIRECT_AI_REPLACEMENT). ChatGPT directly caused 50%+ stock drop and reduced revenue. Current entry has only 1 event — need to track subsequent layoffs and financial impact. Primary source: Chegg SEC filings.
Already in dataset (Tier 2, AI_DRIVEN_RESTRUCTURING). 28,000 jobs. Need to find primary sources: earnings calls, investor presentations. French company — check Euronext filings.
French retailer. Announced AI-driven layoffs in 2024. Reportedly using AI for supply chain and administrative tasks. Check French media (Le Monde, Les Echos) and Carrefour investor relations.
German food delivery company. AI automating customer support operations. Check German media (Handelsblatt, FAZ) and investor materials.
German fashion retailer. AI logistics optimization leading to layoffs. Check German business press.
CEO Tobi Lutke has been heavily AI-forward. Previous layoffs (2023) were not AI-linked. Recent restructured roles may be AI-driven. Check Shopify earnings calls 2024.
EA CEO announced AI as central to game development. Layoffs in quality assurance and art departments. Check gaming press (Kotaku, IGN) and EA investor calls.
AI content moderation replacing human moderators. Multiple reports of moderation team reductions. Check Chinese media (Caixin, Reuters) and TikTok company blog.

Already in dataset. CEO explicitly stated AI would replace roles. Need to find expanded evidence, SEC filings, and earnings call transcripts. Intuit announced 1800 layoffs in July 2024 explicitly citing AI.
Already in dataset. 12,000 job cuts announced Jan 2024. AI and automation cited in earnings calls. Need to find primary source: UPS investor relations, earnings call transcripts.

Already in dataset (SECONDARY_SOURCE). Need to find primary source — company statement, CEO memo, or investor update. Traffic dropped 50% due to ChatGPT. Check Stack Overflow blog and CEO Prashanth Chandrasekar's statements.
Already in dataset (SECONDARY_SOURCE). Duolingo cut 10% of contractors in Jan 2024, citing AI. Need to find Duolingo blog post or CEO Luis von Ahn's statements.
Already in dataset. 4,000 job cuts Feb 2024. AI shift narrative. Need Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins statements and Cisco investor relations.
Already in dataset. IBM paused hiring for jobs AI could replace. CEO Arvind Krishna explicitly stated 7,800 back-office roles could be replaced by AI. Need earnings call transcripts.
